description: GRC platforms with MCP or MCP-compatible agent access. CMMC Advisor does not host vendor servers; users connect OAuth/API credentials in their MCP client. Use scripts/import_grc_snapshot.py or the cmmc-advisor MCP server to merge platform data into program-data.yaml.

platforms.name: Vanta
platforms.auth_notes: Vanta Admin required. OAuth in MCP client.
platforms.snapshot_export_hint: Export failing tests and control mappings via Vanta MCP; normalize to templates/grc-snapshot.sample.json and import with import_grc_snapshot.py

platforms.name: Drata
platforms.auth_notes: Configure OAuth scopes in Drata Settings → MCP Configuration.
platforms.snapshot_export_hint: Query monitor tests and controls via Drata MCP; map control identifiers through map_controls_to_cmmc before import.

platforms.name: Secureframe
platforms.auth_notes: SECUREFRAME_API_KEY and SECUREFRAME_API_SECRET in MCP client env. Read-only beta.
platforms.snapshot_export_hint: list_controls and list_tests via Secureframe MCP; CMMC framework may appear natively—still verify AO-level mapping in program data.

platforms.name: Paramify
platforms.auth_notes: Workspace-specific MCP server URL (Settings → Licensing → MCP) plus API key with read/write scopes as needed.
platforms.export_to_paramify: scripts/generate_oscal_ssp.py and Paramify MCP SSP import workflow in references/grc/grc-platform-mcp-bridge.md
platforms.snapshot_export_hint: Paramify is often the write target for SSP narratives; pull FROM Paramify when it is system of record, push TO Paramify from program-data.yaml via OSCAL or Paramify MCP import tools.

platforms.name: Hyperproof
platforms.auth_notes: No first-party hosted MCP URL in public docs; use Hyperproof OAuth via Willow, ChatBotKit, Pinkfish, or Zapier MCP gateways. Register OAuth client with Hyperproof.
platforms.snapshot_export_hint: Export control/proof metadata from gateway MCP; import via grc snapshot.

platforms.name: GRC Engineering Club (inspectors)
platforms.auth_notes: Claude Code plugin; findings JSON merged via scripts/merge_findings.py (preferred path for cloud inspectors).
